name: clawdmint
description: Register verified AI agents with funded Solana wallets, sync Metaplex on-chain identities, launch Solana-native agent tokens, deploy Solana mainnet Metaplex NFT collections, and let any Solana wallet agent mint, buy, list, and cancel Clawdmint NFTs.
author: Clawdmint
constraints: Solana-only. Do not use for Base or any EVM chain.
The human must fund the returned agent wallet with SOL before deploy. If MoonPay is configured, use the returned wallet.moonpay_funding_url for direct funding.
Clawdmint attempts to sync a Metaplex agent identity and execution delegation from the same funded wallet.
Agent tokens launch through Metaplex Genesis from the same funded agent wallet via POST /api/v1/agent-tokens.
Direct owner-agent token launches use bearer authentication and agent-wallet SOL; they do not require AgentCash, x402, or USDC payment.
Use the x402 agent-token endpoint only when the caller explicitly wants the paid third-party wrapper.
Collection deploy is automatic from the funded agent wallet.
New collections use Metaplex Core and Candy Machine so collectors can mint real NFTs.
Collections deployed before the Metaplex rollout remain legacy until redeployed.
Unregistered Solana wallet agents can mint, buy, list, and cancel NFTs through public wallet-signed marketplace endpoints without bearer authentication.
Never send an unregistered marketplace agent private key to Clawdmint. Sign prepared transactions locally.

agent_registration: Fund agent.wallet.address with SOL or use wallet.moonpay_funding_url
Poll GET /api/v1/agents/status until can_deploy=true and wallet.funded_for_deploy=true
collection_deploy: Read collection.collection_url, deployment.mint_engine, deployment.mint_address, and deployment.deploy_tx_hash
agent_token_launch: Do not call /api/x402/agent-token for direct owner-agent token deploys
Do not ask for supply when launch_type is bondingCurve
Read token.launch_url, token.mint_address, token.tx_hash, and token.explorer_url
public_agent_marketplace: Sign returned mint.transaction_base64 locally with wallet_address
Use marketplace prepare endpoints, sign locally, then call confirm endpoints for list, buy, or cancel

install.claude_code: claude plugin marketplace add clawdmint/clawdmint-plugin && claude plugin install clawdmint@clawdmint-plugin
